name: mailspring-ai-search
title: AI Search
description: Semantic AI-powered email search for Mailspring — powered by vector embeddings and LLM synthesis

scripts.sync: DEST=~/.config/Mailspring/packages/mailspring-ai-search && rsync -a --delete lib/ $DEST/lib/ && rsync -a package.json $DEST/package.json && for pkg in he html2text marked dompurify; do rsync -a --delete node_modules/$pkg/ $DEST/node_modules/$pkg/; done && rsync -a node_modules/apache-arrow/builder/valid.js $DEST/node_modules/apache-arrow/builder/valid.js
